untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of Fair Value using external inputs (cash index price C, annualized interest rate r, annualized dividend payment D, time to maturity t, execution costs FE) and comparison of futures price to this derived fair value. These are not available as standard indicators in the allowed list. The profitability threshold and sufficient_difference_amount are explicitly marked AUTHOR_SILENT, making the exact entry conditions impossible to specify. Program trade execution (simultaneous buy/sell of different instruments) also falls outside standard backtest engine capabilities.
translation_notes: This is a cash-and-carry arbitrage signal that requires real-time access to multiple market data feeds (futures prices, spot prices, interest rates, dividend schedules) and cross-instrument execution logic. Cannot be translated to single-instrument technical indicator rules. Requires custom implementation in a dedicated arbitrage trading system.
